title: MRCL Recommended Pack
description: Mods recommended for playing our server, Minecraft Replika of Code Lyoko.
body:
This is the modpack we recommend using for playing our server, Minecraft Replika of Code Lyoko.

These mods are not NEEDED to enjoy the game, but using these mods will help you have a smoother and more interesting experience in the server.


Have fun! :)
